name: Obsidian MCP
description: MCP server connecting AI agents to Obsidian vaults via the Local REST API plugin. Read, search, and write notes to ground agent workflows in a personal knowledge base.

skills.name: Note Search
skills.description: Search across your Obsidian vault by content, tags, or title using the Local REST API plugin

skills.name: Note Read
skills.description: Read full note content and frontmatter from any file in the Obsidian vault via MCP tools

skills.name: Note Write
skills.description: Create and update Obsidian notes from agent outputs to build a persistent knowledge base
